zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena Esther Barry於1549年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克巴利洛時，她的父親James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry29歲，母親Ellen MacCarthy Reagh77歲。她於大約1570年與Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波 卡素享年71歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena Esther Barry于1549年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克巴利洛时，她的父亲James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry29岁，母亲Ellen MacCarthy Reagh77岁。她于大约1570年与Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan在爱尔兰庫迪 科克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波 卡素享年71岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: Esther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by a Jewish captive who became the wife of the Persian king Ahasuerus. Her Hebrew name was Hadassah ‘myrtle’, and the form Esther is said to be a Persian translation of this, although others derive it from Persian stara ‘star’. It may also be a Hebrew form of the name of the Persian goddess Ishtar. According to the book of the Bible that bears her name, Esther managed, by her perception and persuasion, to save large numbers of the Jews from the evil machinations of the royal counsellor Haman. See also Hester .

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena Esther Barry was born in 1549, in Barryroe, County Cork, Ireland, her father, James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry, was 29 and her mother, Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, was 77. She married Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan about 1570, in County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1620, in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena Esther Barry est née en 1549, à Barryroe, County Cork, Irlande, son père, James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, avait 77 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan environ 1570, à County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1620, à Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena Esther Barry 1549 in Barryroe, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry 29 und ihre Mutter Ellen MacCarthy Reagh 77. Sie hat um 1570 in County Cork, Irland Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1620 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena Esther Barry è nata il nel 1549 nel Barryroe, County Cork, Irlanda, sua padre, James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, aveva 77 anni. Lei sposato Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan circa 1570, nel County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1620, nel Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena Esther Barryが1549年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクバーリローで生まれた時，父James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barryは29歳，母Ellen MacCarthy Reaghは77歳であった。約1570年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクでSir Owen Reagh O'Sullivanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクダンボイ カストルで71歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena Esther Barry(이)가 1549년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 배리로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen MacCarthy Reagh(은)는 77세였다. 그녀는 대략 1570년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이 카스틀에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena Esther Barry nasceu em 1549, em Barryroe, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, tinha 77 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan aproximadamente 1570, em County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1620, em Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena Esther Barry родилась в 1549 г. в местности барриро, коунти корк, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, 77. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan около 1570 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1620 г. в местности дунбои кастл, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena Esther Barry nació en 1549, en Barryroe, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, James barry roe viscount Buttevant Barry 4th Viscount Buttevant 17th Baron Barry, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ellen MacCarthy Reagh, tenía 77 años. Se casó con Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan aproximadamente 1570, en County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1620, en Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Irlanda.
